name: vantage-web
description: Vantage — a real-time, multi-domain common operating picture from free, no-key data: an Air/Sky domain (real aircraft, satellites, planets, weather and stars at their true positions) and a Ground/City domain (live incidents, hazards, traffic and public cameras fused into hotspots). This package is the web/dev backend; the native Windows app lives in src-tauri/.
